description: HMS-LOE source hit: query about blood pressure targets in hypertension should return an HMS-LOE chunk with a CEBM recommendation grade and source_year within the acceptable window.
what_bug_this_catches: If HMS-LOE ingestor fails silently (chunks not stored), HMS-LOE chunks never appear in retrieval results. The verifier guideline_grade_present rule also depends on HMS-LOE chunks having source_organization='HMS-LOE' rather than falling through to the CDC-ACIP branch, which would incorrectly reject valid CEBM grades.

input.query: blood pressure target hypertension systolic 130 adults CKD diabetes
